name: Bacon Cheese Puffs
instructions: 1. Place the bacon in a large, deep skillet. Cook over medium-high heat until evenly brown. Drain, crumble and set aside. 2. Preheat oven to broil. 3. In a medium bowl combine the bacon, cheese, mustard and mayonnaise. Stir well. 4. Arrange party bread on a cookie sheet. Spoon mixture onto each slice of bread. 5. Broil for 5 minutes, or until bubbly.
simpleInstructions: 1. Cook bacon, crumble and set aside. 2. Preheat to broil. 3. Combine the bacon, cheese, mustard, and mayonnaise. 4. Spoon mixture on bread. Broil until bubbly.
